name: email
description: Read recent unread email from the user's Mail.app inbox, or send a plain-text message from their default account.
when_to_use: User asks what's in their inbox, who recently emailed them, or asks you to send an email.
when_not_to_use: User wants you to read a saved email file (use file_read). User wants iMessage / SMS (use messages skill). For an at-a-glance digest of the inbox, the email-digest.md context report is usually enough — only call this skill when the report doesn't have what they need or they want to take action.

limit.description: For mode=recent: how many unread to return (default 10, max 50).

messages.description: For recent: list of {id, subject, sender, received, read}.

input.subject: Re: Lunch?
input.body: Sounds good — 1pm at the usual place.
